title: Lap Pumpkin Spice Latte Terracotta
source_attribution: LAP Productions · The Pumpkin Spice Latte (sister of Pistachio ref)

typography_summary: Tracked caps top + Oswald display + italic Cormorant quote + tracked bottom · sister to #004
why_good: Sister design da Pistachio — prova que template é repeatable mantendo authority
Terracotta swap por navy faz mood diferente mantendo structure
Top labels (PUMPKIN PUREE / OAT MILK / COOKIE CRUMBS) = ingredientes destacados
Italic quote + 5-star rating constrói credibility editorial
caveats: Tom 'rated for cult classic' é cinematográfico — adaptar para Só Rio com 'Mesa do Chef recomenda' ou similar
